This classification places Odontarrhena chondrogyna as an evergreen shrub native to Australia. The family Rubiaceae is a large and diverse group, comprising around 600 genera and 13,000 species. The classification of Odontarrhena chondrogyna reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the Rubiaceae family.
